title: BankRecs
description: Stores historical bank reconciliation records, summarizing the state of a reconciliation at a specific point in time. Internal Name: BankRecs (file_num: 19). Each record represents a finalized reconciliation for a specific bank account and statement date.

SequenceNumber.description: Internal unique identifier for this bank reconciliation record. Indexed.

LastModifiedTime.description: Timestamp indicating the last time this reconciliation record was modified.

Account.description: The general ledger account code (potentially including department suffix, e.g., '1000-ABC') that was reconciled.

Opening.description: The opening balance of the account in MoneyWorks at the start of the reconciliation period (usually the closing balance from the previous finalized reconciliation).

Closing.description: The closing balance as entered by the user from the bank statement for the period being reconciled.

Statement.description: The statement number or page number entered by the user during the reconciliation setup.

Date.description: The closing date of the bank statement that was reconciled.

ReconciledTime.description: Timestamp indicating when this specific reconciliation was finalized successfully.

Discrepancy.description: The difference calculated during the reconciliation process between the expected closing balance (based on MoneyWorks transactions) and the bank statement closing balance. This should ideally be zero when the reconciliation is finalized.
